frontmatter.name: Role to SOP Plan
frontmatter.overview: Post-calibration plan for auditing the existing reference corpus, producing proposal shortlists for each repo, human-reviewing those proposals before comparison, comparing the reviewed corpus, and then human-reviewing the final .agents inclusion set before any actual repo work begins.

todos.content: Copy .agents rules/skills/subagents into .references/.agents/ with a README
Run one pi-subagents worker per repo in .references/, produce namespaced audit shortlists
Output chat-stream summary of per-repo findings and early cross-repo patterns
Human reviews repo-level shortlists and copies approved files to .plans/approved/audits/
Run 3-phase pi-subagents pipeline (scout → per-SOP workers → formatter) to produce cross-repo-shortlist.md
Output chat-stream summary of cross-repo findings and recommended category layout
Human reviews cross-repo shortlist and copies approved version to .plans/approved/shortlist.md
Draft SYNTHESIZE-PROMPT.md from approved shortlist, then human reviews before synthesis begins
Run pi-subagents workers per approved shortlist item to write skills/rules/subagents
File PR via /pr-file and wait for human review before merge
